item.title: Cats are smarter than we think 😂 Mari definitely has a whole plan when she wants Churu. Please tell me your cat does this too. Haha🤣 #cutecats #britishshorthair #cat #catsoftiktok #dreaminacpp @dreamina_ai

item.title: #stitch with @Bobby the Cat Dad 🚫 Please Don’t Do This To Your Cats! . ‼️ This content creator doesn’t care what he’s doing, he just wants more followers & he’s getting it. Why?? . 🤢 Because we live in a society that enjoys seeing cats being mistreated. .
item.description: By @wildatheartcats: #stitch with @Bobby the Cat Dad 🚫 Please Don’t Do This To Your Cats! . ‼️ This content creator doesn’t care what he’s doing, he just wants more followers & he’s getting it. Why?? . 🤢 Because we live in a society that enjoys seeing cats being mistreated. .
